title: Review this uncommitted diff for bugs, security issues, and code quality. Be concise (max 10 lines).
summary_text: 1. High: [`CLAUDE.md:189`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/CLAUDE.md#L189) says `Manus` is “使用不可”, but [`CLAUDE.md:241`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/CLAUDE.md#L241) still says “Manus 一択”; that is an operational contradiction that can send the workflow down an impossible path. 2. Medium: [`CLAUDE.md:184`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/CLAUDE.md#L184) makes `OpenAI gpt-image-1` the first choice, but there is no implementation reference in the repo outside this doc, so the diff appears to introduce a non-existent supported path. 3. Medium: The new policy bans HTML fallback and blocks non-card posts without a “high-quality” generator, but runtime guidance still depends on `NB2`/`thumbnail-templates.js` as fallback in [`account_profile.py:18`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/account_profile.py#L18) while posting logic only enforces `image_path` presence in [`scheduler.py:275`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scheduler.py#L275); this split-brain doc/runtime state is likely to cause operator error. 4. No direct security issue found in the diff itself.
